title: Survive on a chunk
description:
👾Join this unique adventure, spawn on a single chunk. 
Gather resources and craft new chunks as time goes by 🐧
🐉 Beat the end, the nether and more added content
body:
Spawn on a single chunk, gather resources and try to survive on this little space. 
If you can gather enough blocks and thanks to the Forge you will be able to summon new chunks and get even more resources, Become the king of the chunk world and grow the size of you land
